entry.title: GX RD (RD-UPK-GXTE-A1) — firmware 2.54.6
entry.summary:
GX RD RD-UPK-GXTE-A1 — firmware 2.54.6

Part: RD GX Body Kit

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. * This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported. * This firmware expands the outboard MicroAdjust trim range of GX and S1000 Eagle Transmission derailleurs from 14 to 23 positions allowing you to further optimize shift performance.

Released: 2025-12-15

entry.title: SIDLUXE SCOTT ULTIMATE AXS (RS-SIDL-STFA-A2) — firmware 2.53.10
entry.summary:
SIDLUXE SCOTT ULTIMATE AXS RS-SIDL-STFA-A2 — firmware 2.53.10

Part: SIDLUXE SCOTT ULTIMATE AXS

Please ensure your AXS App and KAROO is on the latest version to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains: New system integration features between Flight Attendant Systems and the Karoo Bike Computers. You can now track FA suspension state, operating mode, actuation counts, battery, and more in-ride on your Karoo. You can also see FA suspension state with GPS data for your ride on Hammerhead Dashboard

Released: 2025-10-16

entry.title: SID SL ULTIMATE (FS-SIDS-UFA-D1) — firmware 2.53.9
entry.summary:
SID SL ULTIMATE FS-SIDS-UFA-D1 — firmware 2.53.9

Part: SID SL ULTIMATE

Please ensure your AXS App and KAROO is on the latest version to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains: New system integration features between Flight Attendant Systems and the Karoo Bike Computers. You can now track FA suspension state, operating mode, actuation counts, battery, and more in-ride on your Karoo. You can also see FA suspension state with GPS data for your ride on Hammerhead Dashboard Broadened adjustable range for Low Speed Compression settings for Pike, Lyrik, and Zeb forks with Charger 3 dampers to allow for firmer setups. You may want to decrease LSC by one click to compensate for the new range Fixed inconsistent behavior when exiting Override mode going back to Auto mode.

Released: 2025-10-16
